description: Node.js runtime metrics for Countly services: CPU, memory, event loop, GC, file descriptors

targets.expr: sum by (service_name)(rate(v8js_gc_duration_seconds_sum{cluster=~"$cluster", service_name=~"$service_name", v8js_gc_type="minor"}[5m])) / (sum by (service_name)(rate(v8js_gc_duration_seconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster", service_name=~"$service_name", v8js_gc_type="minor"}[5m])) > 0)

sum by (service_name)(rate(v8js_gc_duration_seconds_sum{cluster=~"$cluster", service_name=~"$service_name", v8js_gc_type="major"}[5m])) / (sum by (service_name)(rate(v8js_gc_duration_seconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster", service_name=~"$service_name", v8js_gc_type="major"}[5m])) > 0)

sum by (service_name)(rate(v8js_gc_duration_seconds_sum{cluster=~"$cluster", service_name=~"$service_name", v8js_gc_type="incremental"}[5m])) / (sum by (service_name)(rate(v8js_gc_duration_seconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster", service_name=~"$service_name", v8js_gc_type="incremental"}[5m])) > 0)

avg by (service_name)(db_client_connections_usage{cluster=~"$cluster", service_name=~"$service_name", state="used"} / ignoring(state) group_left clamp_min(sum without(state)(db_client_connections_usage{cluster=~"$cluster", service_name=~"$service_name"}), 1) * 100)

sum by (service_name)(rate(countly_http_server_duration_milliseconds_sum{cluster=~"$cluster", service_name=~"$service_name"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (service_name)(rate(countly_http_server_duration_milliseconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster", service_name=~"$service_name"}[5m])), 1)

title: Countly Runtime
